title: GapFinding
description: A place the vocabulary refuses to fit, folded by the audit. Like loop/gaps.py: each finding names a kind, a subject, why, and one concrete next move that is an existing pen's verb or a human call. The fold writes nothing and decides nothing (D-4).

kind.description: unresolved-evidence: a citation points at nothing. ghost-term: claims a backing, none resolves. overloaded-term: >=2 incompatible senses. orphaned-term: a lone definition, no economy. class-drift: declared class != evidence-derived class.

why.description: the divergence between a claim and the bytes, in one cold-reader line.

move.description: the one concrete next step — an existing pen's verb or 'needs bdo'. Never a guess at a gh-shaped action.
